title: Citrusy Crumbly Mexican Trout Crumble
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring vegan rainbow trout blended with citrus flavors and served as a crumbly topping over warm quinoa.
instructions: Boil water in a pot and add quinoa according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté minced onion and garlic in olive oil until translucent. Add sliced bell peppers and cook for another minute.
Add drained chicaned tomatoes, fresh lime juice, salt, pepper, and cooked quinoa into the pan mixture. Mix well and let it simmer.
Meanwhile, season trout fillets with salt and pepper on both sides. Place them in a baking dish and bake at 400°F (205°C) for about 12 minutes or until fully cooked.
When ready to serve, gently mix the quinoa mixture into blender, add fresh lime juice and blend well till you get a thick but pourable consistency.
Spread the crumble over the warm trout fillets and garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
